languages.original_text: "Прошу... Пожалуйста, мой сын умрет без помощи..." {n}женщина-боец с грохотом падает на колени перед вами.{/n}

languages.text: "Bitte... Bitte, mein Sohn wird ohne Hilfe sterben...", die {n}Kämpferin fällt vor dir auf die Knie.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please... Please, my son will die without help..." the {n}female fighter groggily falls to her knees in front of you.{/n}

languages.text: "S'il vous plaît... S'il vous plaît, mon fils va mourir sans aide..." la {n}combattante tombe à genoux devant vous.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please... Please, my son will die without help..." the {n}female fighter groggily falls to her knees in front of you.{/n}

languages.text: "求求你求求你，如果没有人帮忙，我的儿子就会死...{n}.{/n}.{n}.{/n}"{n}女战士摸索着跪倒在你面前。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please... Please, my son will die without help..." the {n}female fighter groggily falls to her knees in front of you.{/n}

languages.text: "Por favor... Por favor, mi hijo morirá sin ayuda..." la {n}luchadora cae grogui de rodillas ante ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please... Please, my son will die without help..." the {n}female fighter groggily falls to her knees in front of you.{/n}

languages.text: 「お願いです。お願いです、私の息子はこのままでは死んでしまいます......」その{n}女性ファイターは、うめきながらあなたの前に膝をついた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Please... Please, my son will die without help..." the {n}female fighter groggily falls to her knees in front of you.{/n}

languages.text: "Lütfen... Lütfen, yardım etmezseniz oğlum ölecek..." {n}kadın savaşçı halsizce önünüzde dizlerinin{/n} üzerine çöküyor.
languages.original_text: "Please... Please, my son will die without help..." the {n}female fighter groggily falls to her knees in front of you.{/n}
